agent.status: Wrapped up the big change to how games come together (each proposed game is now its own thing - neighbors get the details by email and tap Interested or Not). Now polishing the wording: the weekly game-on email spells out where, when, and who's coming, called-off weeks don't ask for money, and I cleaned up punctuation across the app's copy.
agent.direction: Get this reviewed and merged to dev, then keep filling coverage gaps.
